days.text: Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy in the afternoon. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming northerlies.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
